welcome: Hi, XiaoF is here to serve you
disclaimer: {{name}} · {{workspace}} · AI may make mistakes, please double check important info
startDialogHelp: Select a workspace to start chatting
noWorkspace: No workspace yet, please create one in the sidebar
xiaofDescription: General AI assistant with all tools and skills

explorer.title: Explore your agent apps
explorer.subtitle: Launch assistants or workflows from here. Assistants open ongoing chats; workflows enter chat too, only asking for Start inputs when extra parameters are configured.
explorer.quickStartDesc: Start a new assistant conversation with XiaoF in the active workspace.
explorer.assistantsHint: Best for ongoing chats, coding collaboration, and tool use
explorer.workflowsHint: Best for single-run tasks and automations with fixed inputs
explorer.emptyWorkflowsDesc: Create a new app from the Workflow page in the sidebar.
